title: acetosella flava
intro: Acetosella flava, also known as the yellow sorrel, is a plant species belonging to the family Oxalidaceae. It is a tropical plant that has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Acetosella flava include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and relieve symptoms of arthritis and other inflammatory conditions. Acetosella flava can be prepared as a tea, infused in water, or made into a tincture to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
